description: Removed unused dependencies (@dapr/dapr, @opentelemetry/core, @opentelemetry/propagator-b3, kafkajs, nats, node-fetch) from package.json as part of hygiene and LLM/agent-friendliness. Only zod remains as an active dependency. See pnpm-lock.yaml for lockfile update.

Reviewed .ai-helpers-cache/archive for DRY/YAGNI compliance. No duplicative or obsolete files found; all archived files are unique or planned. Added pre-commit and CI knip checks for ongoing dead code/dependency hygiene.
Periodically review and prune .ai-helpers-cache/archive/ for legacy or obsolete files as part of the nootropic rebranding and ongoing maintenance.
note: Add a scheduled review of the archive to ensure only necessary legacy files are retained. Remove obsolete or fully-migrated files.
